zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lumley於大約1389年出生在英國時，她的父親Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley30歲，母親Eleanor Neville31歲。她於大約1407年與Thomas de Stathum在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1462年12月9日在英國波克夏比善姆享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Lumley于大约1389年出生在英国时，她的父亲Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley30岁，母亲Eleanor Neville31岁。她于大约1407年与Thomas de Stathum在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1462年12月9日在英国波克夏比善姆享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lumley was born about 1389, in England, her father, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, was 30 and her mother, Eleanor Neville, was 31. She married Thomas de Stathum about 1407, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 9 December 1462, in Bisham, Berkshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Lumley est née environ 1389, à Angleterre, son père, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Neville, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Stathum environ 1407, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 décembre 1462, à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Lumley um 1389 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley 30 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Neville 31. Sie hat um 1407 in Derbyshire, England Thomas de Stathum geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 9. Dezember 1462 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lumley è nata il circa 1389 nel England, sua padre, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Neville, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Stathum circa 1407, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 9 dicembre 1462, nel Bisham, Berkshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lumleyが約1389年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumleyは30歳，母Eleanor Nevilleは31歳であった。約1407年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでThomas de Stathumと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1462年12月9日にイギリスバークシュアイアビシャムで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lumley(이)가 대략 1389년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Neville(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 영국 더비실르에서 Thomas de Stathum(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 12월 9일 영국 버크실르 비샤에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lumley nasceu aproximadamente 1389, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Neville, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Stathum aproximadamente 1407, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1462, em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lumley родилась около 1389 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Neville, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Stathum около 1407 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 9 декабря 1462 г. в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Lumley nació aproximadamente 1389, en Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eleanor Neville, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas de Stathum aproximadamente 1407, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1462, en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
